summary: Excellent audio capture of a high‑energy June 1987 show with strong playing throughout.
review: Both reviewers give the recording five stars, praising its superb sound quality—described as “awesome” and “much better than anything else out there.” The performance is also lauded as very good, noting the band’s desire and drive despite a modest setlist. No specific song or personnel issues are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high star ratings (5/5) and uniformly positive comments on both sound and performance indicate an outstanding show with excellent recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers call the audio “awesome” and “VG,” noting it is far better than other Dead recordings they’ve heard; no flaws reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Even though the setlist isn’t remarkable on paper, reviewers highlight a lot of desire and bearing down in the playing, giving the show strong momentum.
